## What does this PR do?



## Type

- [ ] New lesson / glossary / puzzle content
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / code change
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate-content` passes (required for content changes)
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm test` pass (required for code changes)
- [ ] Content is kid-appropriate and prose is original (no copyrighted book text)
- [ ] No `id` of existing content was renamed
